title: eragrostis × pseudobtusa
intro: Eragrostis × pseudobtusa, also known as false oat grass, is a hybrid species of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis × pseudobtusa include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as its potential to help lower cholesterol levels and improve immune function. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or capsules, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
